ocr.text: Components  Chinese name  Origin  Amount used (g)
Polygoni Multiflori Radix  He Shou Wu  Polygonum multiflorum Thunb.  180
Herba Bidentis Bipinnatae  Gui Zhen Cao  Bidens pilosa Linnaeus  110
Corni Fructus  Shan Zhu Yu  Cornus officinalis  108
Scrophulariae Radix  Xuan Shen  Scrophularia ningpoensis  180
Alismatis Rhizoma  Ze Xie  Alisma orientalis  180
Cyathulae Radix  Chuan Niu Xi  Cyathula officinalis  170
Tracheostomy  Non Tracheostomy  p Value
The first table presents the components and their respective details, including "Components," "Chinese name," "Origin," and
"Amount used (g)." The row for "Polygoni Multiflori Radix" lists the Chinese name as "He Shou Wu," the origin as
"Polygonum multiflorum Thunb.," and the amount used is 180 g. Next, "Herba Bidentis Bipinnatae" has the Chinese name "Gui
Zhen Cao," the origin "Bidens pilosa Linnaeus," with 110 g used. For "Corni Fructus," the Chinese name is "Shan Zhu Yu," the
origin is "Cornus officinalis," and the amount used is 108 g. The "Scrophulariae Radix," known as "Xuan Shen," comes from
"Scrophularia ningpoensis," with an amount of 180 g. "Alismatis Rhizoma," or "Ze Xie," has "Alisma orientalis" as its origin
and an amount of 180 g. Finally, "Cyathulae Radix," referred to as "Chuan Niu Xi," originates from "Cyathula officinalis" and

has an amount of 170 g. 

The second table compares "Tracheostomy" and "Non Tracheostomy" measurements across various
days with a "p Value." On Day 1, Tracheostomy is 4.06 ± 1.0278 and Non Tracheostomy is 4.14 ± 0.9382, with a p value of
0.6882. Day 2 shows 5.04 ± 1.1825 for Tracheostomy and 4.74 ± 1.1800 for Non Tracheostomy (p = 0.2117). On Day 3, values
values are 7.12 ± 2.7472 and 6.91 ± 2.9671 (p = 0.7324). By Day 10, Tracheostomy is 8.35 ± 3.1983 and Non Tracheostomy is
7.00 ± 3.4935 (p = 0.0723). Finally, on Day 15, Tracheostomy is 9.97 ± 3.0477, Non Tracheostomy is 7.20 ± 3.3506, and the p
value is 0.0009.
